LED Screen Maintenance & Support Services in Singapore

Protect your investment with Auronova’s maintenance packages. We offer preventative maintenance, on-site troubleshooting, and remote technical support to ensure your digital screens are always running smoothly.

Maximum uptime means your message is always visible, your brand always looks its best, and your investment works harder for longer.

Maximum Uptime, Minimal Worry

Digital signage and LED displays are powerful tools—until something goes wrong. A dark screen, flickering panel, or unresponsive player doesn’t just look bad; it interrupts communication, undermines your brand image, and can even affect sales or operations. Auronova’s Maintenance & Support services are designed to give you maximum uptime with minimal worry, so you can focus on your business instead of your screens.

Protect your investment with Auronova’s maintenance packages. We provide a structured combination of preventive maintenance, on-site troubleshooting, and remote technical support to keep your digital screens, media players, and supporting systems running smoothly. Whether you operate a single flagship installation or a network of displays across multiple locations, Auronova stands behind your system long after the installation is complete.

Protect Your Digital Signage Investment with Planned Maintenance

LED displays, LCD panels, media players, mounts, and cabling are all long-term investments. Like any other mission-critical infrastructure, they need regular care to perform at their best. Dust, heat, constant operation, minor knocks, and configuration changes can all gradually degrade performance if left unchecked.

Auronova’s maintenance packages are created to:

Extend hardware lifespan through regular cleaning, inspection and tuning

Detect and resolve small issues before they become costly failures

Keep display quality consistent with your brand standards

Reduce unplanned downtime and emergency call-outs

Instead of reacting only when something breaks, you benefit from a proactive service model that keeps your digital signage network healthy and dependable.

Tailored Digital Signage Maintenance Packages for Every Network Size

No two deployments are exactly the same. A small lobby screen, a multi-panel video wall, and a building façade LED installation all have different operating conditions and risk profiles. That’s why Auronova offers flexible maintenance packages that can be tailored to your environment, usage patterns, and budget.

Typical package components include:

Scheduled preventive maintenance visits — quarterly, bi-annual or annual

Defined response times for support requests and on-site interventions

Remote support hours for diagnostics and configuration changes

Coverage for specific components or entire systems

During consultation, we work with you to understand how critical each display or location is to your operations. Together, we define a maintenance plan that provides the right level of coverage—whether you need basic preventive care or a more comprehensive, SLA-driven arrangement.

Preventive LED Screen Maintenance — Fix Problems Before They Appear

Preventive maintenance is the backbone of Auronova’s support philosophy. Rather than waiting for issues to disrupt your operations, we regularly check your systems to keep them in optimal condition.

A typical preventive maintenance visit may include:

Visual inspection of all displays for signs of wear, damage or irregularities

Checking mounts, brackets and fixtures for stability and safety

Cleaning display surfaces and ventilation areas to prevent overheating

Verifying power connections, cabling and connectors

Testing media players, controllers and network connections for stability

Brightness, colour and uniformity calibration checks

These routine checks help catch issues such as loose connections, blocked vents, early pixel failures, or misalignment before they affect the viewing experience. By addressing them early, you avoid urgent breakdowns and maintain a consistent visual standard across your network.

On-Site Digital Signage Troubleshooting When You Need It Most

Even with preventive care, unexpected issues can still occur—power fluctuations, accidental damage, environmental factors, or software conflicts. When something goes wrong, you want a team that understands your system and can respond quickly and effectively.

Auronova’s on-site troubleshooting services cover:

Diagnosing black screens, flickering, colour problems or partial display failures

Investigating media player, cabling and connectivity issues affecting content playback

Resolving configuration issues with controllers, processors or content management systems

Replacing or reseating faulty components where necessary

Because we are familiar with your installation, we can often identify and resolve issues faster than a general contractor with no history of the system. Our technicians arrive prepared with the information and tools required to get you back up and running as quickly as possible.

Remote Technical Support for Rapid Fault Resolution

Many issues can be addressed without a physical site visit. Auronova’s remote technical support gives you quick access to experts who can guide your team through basic checks, connect to systems (where permitted), and resolve software or configuration issues from afar.

Remote support can help with:

Verifying content schedules and playback settings in your CMS

Checking device status, software versions and error logs

Guiding your staff through simple resets, reboots or cable checks

Making minor adjustments to display settings or configurations remotely

This remote-first approach saves time and cost, ensuring you get a rapid response for many common issues. If we determine that an on-site visit is necessary, we arrive already armed with diagnostic insights, which shortens the time needed to solve the problem.

Maximising Digital Signage Uptime Across All Your Locations

Your digital screens often carry time-sensitive promotions, critical information, or brand-defining visuals. Every hour of downtime is lost opportunity—or worse, confusion for your audience. Auronova’s Maintenance & Support services are built around one simple objective: keep your screens running smoothly.

We focus on:

Minimising unplanned outages through scheduled preventive care

Restoring service quickly through remote and on-site intervention

Maintaining consistent display quality across all screens and locations

Clear visibility on system health and upcoming maintenance schedules

By having a professional partner watching over your network, you reduce the risk of unpleasant surprises and build confidence that your digital signage will be there when you need it.

Maintenance Support for All Major Digital Signage Display Types

Digital signage systems are made up of many interconnected parts, and issues can originate anywhere in the chain. Auronova’s teams are experienced across all major display types and system components, including:

We focus on:

Indoor and outdoor LED displays and video walls

LCD commercial panels and high-brightness window displays

Interactive kiosks and touch-enabled screens

Media players, controllers, scalers and processors

Network components related to content delivery

Rather than bouncing between multiple vendors when something goes wrong, you can rely on a single partner who understands the full system and can coordinate any necessary actions.

Transparent Reporting and Clear Communication on Every Job

Good support is not just about fixing problems—it’s also about communication. Auronova provides clear, professional updates at each step of the maintenance and support process, so you always know what is happening and what to expect.

Our communication typically includes:

Acknowledgment of support requests with estimated response times

Status updates while diagnostics or repairs are in progress

Clear explanations of root causes and steps taken to resolve them

Recommendations for preventive actions or upgrades where recurring issues are identified

For clients with ongoing maintenance contracts, we can also provide periodic reports summarising minor faults, interventions, and observations, helping you make informed decisions about future investments or improvements.

Minimal Disruption to Your Business Operations

We understand that most of our clients operate in busy environments—malls, offices, campuses, public venues, and retail outlets—where any work near screens needs to be carefully managed.

When delivering maintenance or on-site support, we:

Scheduling work to avoid peak trading hours and sensitive business periods

Safe work area setup with appropriate caution signage and barriers

Efficient on-site work with respect for your staff, customers and environment

Full clean-up once work is complete, leaving your space ready for normal operations

Our goal is to keep your digital signage working without disrupting the very experiences it is meant to enhance.

Future-Proofing: Digital Signage Upgrades & Optimisation Planning

Technology evolves, and so do your communication needs. As part of ongoing Maintenance & Support, Auronova can advise you on when and how to upgrade components, improve configurations, or expand your network.

This may involve:

Recommending hardware replacements when components approach end-of-life

Suggesting brightness or configuration adjustments for changing ambient conditions

Proposing content management or control system enhancements for easier operation

Identifying opportunities to expand your screen network based on performance data

By treating maintenance as an ongoing partnership instead of a one-time service, we help you keep your digital signage strategy aligned with your broader business goals.

Why Choose Auronova for Digital Signage Maintenance & Support in Singapore?

Choosing Auronova for Maintenance & Support means you are not left alone with complex technology once installation is complete. You gain:

This may involve:

Structured maintenance packages that protect your hardware investment

Preventive maintenance to keep systems healthy and reduce failures

On-site troubleshooting when physical intervention is required

Remote technical support for rapid diagnosis and resolution

One experienced partner who understands your entire digital signage ecosystem

Most importantly, you gain confidence. Confidence that your digital screens will be ready when you launch a campaign, host an event, welcome visitors, or communicate vital information. Confidence that if something goes wrong, there is a clear plan and a capable team ready to help.

Frequently Asked Questions — LED Screen Maintenance & Support

How often should LED screens be serviced?

For most LED screens in Singapore, we recommend preventive servicing once or twice a year. If your display is outdoors, or sits in a busy or dusty spot, quarterly checks are a better fit. Our climate doesn’t help here, as the heat and humidity speed up dust build-up and wear on the components. Regular cleaning, inspection, and calibration keep your screen from overheating and help you avoid early pixel failures. Auronova offers quarterly, bi-annual, and annual packages, and we’ll match one to how and where your screens are used.

How long do LED display screens last?

A good LED display will generally run for about 100,000 hours, which works out to roughly 7 to 10 years of continuous use. That said, how long yours actually lasts comes down to the conditions it operates in and the care it gets. Dust, blocked ventilation, power fluctuations, and running at full brightness all the time can shorten its life noticeably. The simplest way to protect your investment and reach that full lifespan is regular preventive maintenance: cleaning, ventilation checks, and brightness calibration.

Can an LED display screen be repaired?

and most cases, yes. Issues like dead pixels, flickering, colour problems, partial blackouts, and faulty modules can usually be fixed by replacing or reseating individual parts rather than the whole screen. Because LED displays are built in modules, a technician can often swap out a single cabinet, module, power supply, or receiving card right on site. At Auronova, we always find the root cause first, whether it’s hardware, cabling, or a configuration setting, before recommending the most sensible and cost-effective repair.

Why is my LED screen flickering or showing a black screen?

Flickering and black screens usually trace back to loose cabling, a failing power supply, a damaged receiving card, overheating, or a problem with the media player or signal. In Singapore’s humid conditions, moisture and dust inside the cabinet can also cause faults that come and go. Some of these we can diagnose remotely, while others need an on-site look. Either way, our support team works through the whole signal chain, from the media player to the panel itself, to find what’s really going on and put it right quickly.

What does LED screen maintenance include?

A typical preventive maintenance visit covers quite a lot. We inspect the panels for wear or damage, clean the display surfaces and ventilation areas, check that mounts and fixtures are safe and secure, verify the power and data connections, test the media players and network stability, and calibrate brightness, colour, and uniformity. The whole point is to catch the small things early, like loose connectors, blocked vents, or a pixel starting to fail, before they turn into costly breakdowns or visible flaws that reflect badly on your brand.

How much does digital signage maintenance cost in Singapore?

It depends on a few things: how many screens you have, what type they are (indoor LED, outdoor LED, LCD, or kiosk), how easy they are to reach, and how fast you need us to respond when something goes wrong. A simple annual plan for one lobby screen costs far less than a service-level agreement covering several locations. As a rough guide, many businesses set aside 10 to 20 percent of their hardware investment each year for maintenance and support. We’ll put together a tailored quote once we understand the size of your network and how critical each screen is to you.

Keep Your Digital Signage Running Worry-Free — Get a Maintenance Quote

Your digital signage network should be a dependable platform, not a constant source of concern. With Auronova’s Maintenance & Support services, you get maximum uptime and minimal worry. Our preventive maintenance, on-site troubleshooting, and remote technical support work together to ensure your digital screens are always running smoothly, so you can keep your focus where it belongs—on serving your customers and growing your business.
